import_youtube_meta_desc: Import metadata from a YouTube video to prepare a Nostr event on NostrTube.
import_youtube_page_desc: Prepare a Nostr reference for a YouTube video without downloading or hosting the file on Blossom.
import_youtube_description: Generate a Nostr event pointing to an original YouTube video while reusing NostrTube editorial metadata.
youtube_import_metadata_only: At this stage, the video will not be downloaded or hosted on Blossom.
youtube_import_original_reference: The event will point to the original URL and the public YouTube thumbnail.
youtube_import_phase_one_notice: Publishing and automatic player metadata are handled by the next phases.
youtube_url_help: Paste a public YouTube URL to validate it and build the initial preview.
invalid_youtube_url: Enter a valid YouTube URL with an 11-character video ID.
youtube_url_detected: Valid URL detected. Click Import to load the preview.
youtube_url_empty_state: Supports youtube.com/watch, youtu.be, embed, v, shorts and youtube-nocookie links.
thumbnail_fallback_hint: The public YouTube image did not load, but the URL and ID are still available.
empty_preview_hint: Import a valid URL to preview the thumbnail and detected data.
youtube_thumbnail_alt: Thumbnail for the imported YouTube video
youtube_import_not_hosted_title: No Blossom upload in this phase
youtube_import_not_hosted_desc: This screen prepares metadata and preview. Event publishing is enabled in the next phases.
youtube_video_check_desc: Confirm the imported video before filling in editorial metadata.
youtube_publish_success_desc: The Nostr event was published with a reference to the original YouTube video.
youtube_metadata_hint: After checking the video, write the title, description and tags that will be published in the event.
youtube_publish_ready: Ready to publish a Nostr event referencing the YouTube video.
youtube_publish_missing_required: Import a valid URL and enter a title to enable publishing.
